title: OAU Successes and Failures
description: Quiz on the record of the OAU, its achievements in decolonisation, and its failures in bringing peace and prosperity.

questions.question: What was the OAU's greatest success during its existence?
options: Eradicating colonialism and white minority rule
questions.correctAnswer: Eradicating colonialism and white minority rule

questions.question: What was the major failing of the OAU?
options: It could not bring peace, prosperity, security, and stability to Africa
It failed to promote any cooperation
questions.correctAnswer: It could not bring peace, prosperity, security, and stability to Africa

questions.question: Why was the OAU considered incapable of meeting the challenges of globalisation?
options: Its powers were too weak and its influence inadequate
It was dominated by European powers
questions.correctAnswer: Its powers were too weak and its influence inadequate

questions.question: By what year did African leaders decide comprehensive reform was imperative?
options: The end of the twentieth century
questions.correctAnswer: The end of the twentieth century

questions.question: What new organisation replaced the OAU?
The OAU's Assembly of Heads of State and Government met how often?
Which OAU organ was responsible for preparing the assembly's agenda?
Who headed the General Secretariat of the OAU?
options: A secretary-general appointed by the Assembly
The chairman of the Council of Ministers
The head of state of the host country
questions.correctAnswer: A secretary-general appointed by the Assembly

questions.question: Which of the following was NOT a problem the OAU failed to adequately address?
What year was the OAU dissolved and replaced?
